codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature goals: it adds a failing-first regression for the real mismatch pattern and updates thread-detail merge logic so identity/lifecycle/summary/updated_at are cohered from fresher archive and merged timeline signals while preserving contract shape.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit diff for bridge-detail-metadata-freshness.
